subject: DevOps
title: Toy Story 2 Nearly Deleted
description: Learn Toy Story 2 Nearly Deleted in one minute.

hook.text: Someone ran rm -rf on Toy Story 2 at Pixar. 90% of the movie vanished from the servers.

buildup.text: Characters started disappearing. Woody's hat, then his boots, then entire scenes.

discovery.text: They pulled the plug on servers to stop it. Then they checked backups. Backups were broken.

twist.text: A director on maternity leave had a full copy on her home computer. The only surviving copy.

climax.text: They drove her machine to the studio wrapped in blankets. The movie was saved from one laptop.

punchline.text: Verify backups actively. Luck saved Toy Story 2.

quiz.question: How was Toy Story 2 ultimately saved?
options: An employee had a copy on their home computer
They rebuilt the movie from scratch in two weeks
